original_abstract: This research aims to plan the process of internalizing Islamic education values ‚Äã‚Äãin character building for students at Inpraes 2 Wagon Elementary School, implementing the process of internalizing Islamic education values ‚Äã‚Äãin character building for students at Inpres 2 Wagom Elementary School, evaluating the process of internalizing Islamic education values ‚Äã‚Äãin character building. in Inpres 2 Wagom Elementary School students. This research uses a descriptive qualitative method, a data mining method using interview methods, hearing aids, cameras and observation phones. Documentation. Primary data sources are the school principal and teacher. Data analysis methods use, Data Reduction (Data Redukcion), data presentation (Data Display), Data verification (Conduction/Drawing). The internalization of Islamic education values ‚Äã‚Äãin character formation at SD Inpres 2 Wagom is carried out by referring to the principle that students are assessed by looking at the extent of their understanding, appreciation and practice of students' behavior.
humanized_abstract: This research is aimed to design the procedure of internalizing the values of Islamic Education on the students of SD Inpraes 2 Wagon Elementary School, designing the procedure of implementing the Islamic Education value on the students of SD Inpres 2 Wagom Elementary School, and explaining the implementation of Islamic Education value on the students of SD Inpres 2 Wagom Elementary School. This research uses the descriptive qualitative method with the data mining by using the technique of interviews, audio, camera, and the observation of documentation. The source of data is the headmaster and teacher of Elementary School. The techniques of data analysis used are Data Reduction (Data Redukcion), data presentation (Data Display), Data verification (Conduction/Drawing). In addition, the implementation of the Islamic Education values for the development of students' character at SD Inpres 2 Wagom is done by taking into account the principles of students' assessment seen from their level of understanding, appreciation and behavior.
